reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio en la estación ACA 2. Yo soy socio del ACA y los empleados no ayudaron luego que el compresor de aire (con pico roto y manguera pinchada) arranco el pico de mi rueda y la dejó en llanta. Espero que el ACA central me contacte.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at ACA station 2. I'm an ACA member, and the employees offered no help after the air compressor (with a broken nozzle and punctured hose) ripped the valve stem off my tire, leaving it flat. I expect ACA headquarters to contact me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MWR5OXpBRRAB
